---
title: "Field Grazing Urchins"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Field Grazing Trials

```{r}
grazing_data_raw <- read_csv("data/grazing_data_raw.csv")
```

```{r}
grazing_data <- grazing_data_raw |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%d%B%Y"))
```

```{r}

grazing_change <- grazing_data |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%d%B%Y")) |>
  group_by(plot) |>
  summarise(
    treatment        = first(treatment),
    change_zostera   = last(percent_zostera) - first(percent_zostera),
    change_halodule  = last(percent_halodule) - first(percent_halodule),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
grazing_change |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  summarise(
    mean_zostera  = mean(change_zostera, na.rm = T),
    se_zostera    = sd(change_zostera, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
    mean_halodule = mean(change_halodule, na.rm = T),
    se_halodule   = sd(change_halodule, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -treatment,
               names_to = c(".value", "species"),
               names_pattern = "(.+)_(.+)") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(treatment), y = mean, fill = species)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
                  position = position_dodge(0.6), width = 0.2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(x = "Number of urchins", y = "Change in percent cover (%)",
         fill = "Species") +
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}


grazing_change_shoots <- grazing_data_raw |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%d%B%Y")) |>
  group_by(plot) |>
  arrange(date) |>
  summarise(
    treatment       = first(treatment),
    change_zostera  = last(z_shoot_density) - first(z_shoot_density),
    change_halodule = last(h_shoot_density) - first(h_shoot_density),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

grazing_change_shoots

grazing_change_shoots |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  summarise(
    mean_zostera  = mean(change_zostera, na.rm = T),
    se_zostera    = sd(change_zostera, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
    mean_halodule = mean(change_halodule, na.rm = T),
    se_halodule   = sd(change_halodule, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -treatment,
               names_to = c(".value", "species"),
               names_pattern = "(.+)_(.+)") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(treatment), y = mean, fill = species)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
                  position = position_dodge(0.6), width = 0.2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(x = "Number of urchins", y = "Change in shoot density", fill = "Species") +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    halodule = "#006600",
    zostera = "#9ACD23"
    )) + 
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}
grazing_change_shoots |>
  mutate(total_change = change_zostera + change_halodule) |>
  arrange(treatment, total_change)
```

```{r}
grazing_change_shoots |>
  mutate(total_change = change_zostera + change_halodule) |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  summarise(mean = mean(total_change, na.rm = T),
            se   = sd(total_change, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(treatment), y = mean)) +
    geom_col(color = "black", fill = "grey70", width = 0.6) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(x = "Number of urchins", y = "Change in total shoot density") +
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}
grazing_change_shoots |>
  mutate(total_change = change_zostera + change_halodule) |>
  (\(d) summary(aov(total_change ~ factor(treatment), data = d)))()

grazing_change_shoots |>
  mutate(total_change = change_zostera + change_halodule) |>
  (\(d) TukeyHSD(aov(total_change ~ factor(treatment), data = d)))()
```

```{r}
grazing_data|>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%d%B%Y")) |>
  filter(date == as.Date("2026-06-10")) |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  summarise(
    mean_zostera  = mean(z_shoot_density, na.rm = T),
    se_zostera    = sd(z_shoot_density, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
    mean_halodule = mean(h_shoot_density, na.rm = T),
    se_halodule   = sd(h_shoot_density, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -treatment,
               names_to = c(".value", "species"),
               names_pattern = "(.+)_(.+)") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(treatment), y = mean, fill = species)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
                  position = position_dodge(0.6), width = 0.2) +
    labs(x = "Number of urchins", y = "Shoot density", fill = "Species") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    halodule = "#006600",
    zostera = "#9ACD23"
    )) + 
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}

june10 <- grazing_data |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%d%B%Y")) |>
  filter(date == as.Date("2026-06-10"))

summary(aov(z_shoot_density ~ factor(treatment), data = june10))
summary(aov(h_shoot_density ~ factor(treatment), data = june10))
```

```{r}

TukeyHSD(aov(h_shoot_density ~ factor(treatment), data = june10))
```

```{r}
june10 |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(z_shoot_density, h_shoot_density),
               names_to = "species",
               values_to = "shoot_density") |>
  mutate(species = ifelse(species == "z_shoot_density", "zostera", "halodule")) |>
  group_by(treatment, species) |>
  summarise(mean = mean(shoot_density, na.rm = T), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(treatment), y = mean, fill = species)) +
    geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.6) +
    labs(x = "Number of urchins", y = "Shoot density", fill = "Species") +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    halodule = "#006600",
    zostera = "#9ACD23"
    )) + 
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}
june10 |>
  mutate(total_shoots = z_shoot_density + h_shoot_density) |>
  (\(d) summary(aov(total_shoots ~ factor(treatment), data = d)))()
```

```{r}
june10 |>
  mutate(total_shoots = z_shoot_density + h_shoot_density) |>
  (\(d) TukeyHSD(aov(total_shoots ~ factor(treatment), data = d)))()
```

```{r}
june10 |>
  mutate(total_shoots = z_shoot_density + h_shoot_density) |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  summarise(total = mean(total_shoots, na.rm = T), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(label = c("", "", "**", "***")) |>
  left_join(
    june10 |>
      pivot_longer(cols = c(z_shoot_density, h_shoot_density),
                   names_to = "species", values_to = "shoot_density") |>
      mutate(species = ifelse(species == "z_shoot_density", "zostera", "halodule")) |>
      group_by(treatment, species) |>
      summarise(mean = mean(shoot_density, na.rm = T), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "treatment"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(treatment), y = mean, fill = species)) +
    geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(y = total + 5, label = label), size = 6) +
    labs(x = "Number of urchins", y = "Shoot density", fill = "Species") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    halodule = "#006600",
    zostera = "#9ACD23"
    )) + 
    theme_classic()

```

```{r}
data.frame(
  comparison = c("1 vs 0", "2 vs 0", "4 vs 0", "2 vs 1", "4 vs 1", "4 vs 2"),
  p_value    = c(0.4369, 0.0006, 0.00005, 0.0264, 0.0031, 0.9183),
  sig        = c("ns", "**", "***", "*", "**", "ns")
)
```
